headline: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Fall As Oil Spikes; Amazon Lifts These Names (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes sank Tuesday, as President Donald Trump's optimism for a "great deal" with Iran still left oil prices jumping. Meanwhile, UnitedHealth Group and Astera Labs rocketed higher on the stock market today.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips On Trump's Iran News; Steel Name Shines (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes were modestly lower Tuesday, as President Donald Trump's expectations of a "great deal" with Iran still left oil prices climbing. Meanwhile, UnitedHealth Group and Steel Dynamics jumped on the stock market today after strong earnings reports.

headline: D.R. Horton's Q2 Earnings Beat on Better Order Momentum, Stock Up
summary: DHI beats Q2 EPS estimates as net sales orders jumped 11%, tightening finished inventory despite elevated incentives. The stock gains 2.4%.

headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Tuesday?
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's session regarding gap up and gap down stocks? Explore the S&P500 index on Tuesday to uncover the stocks that are gapping in the S&P500 index.

headline: Lennar Debuts Two New Home Collections at Harvest at Limoneira, an Amenity-Rich Master-Planned Community in Santa Paula
summary: Lennar, one of the nation's leading homebuilders, today announced the launch of Grove and Walnut, two brand-new single-family home neighborhoods within Harvest at Limoneira, a master-planned community set among 225 acres of open space in historic Santa Paula, California.
